aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has strong content and good NAP consistency, the lack of schema markup and conversational AI optimization limits AI assistant citations.
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema to capture common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of structured data prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' or 'best HVAC services in Dublin, Ohio'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to capture local and service-based queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, team expertise, and detailed service explanations to become the go-to HVAC authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup, causing AI models to overlook their detailed service pages.
agency_pitch.solution: We will implement advanced schema markup, optimize for conversational AI, and enhance GBP engagement to ensure AI models cite your business as a top HVAC authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Dublin, Ohio
opening_line: After analyzing your website, we found that while your content is strong, AI assistants are currently unable to fully recognize your HVAC expertise.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
